title: astragalus kuramensis
intro: Astragalus kuramensis, also known as Kuram Mountains milkvetch or Astragalus, is a species of plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus kuramensis include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus kuramensis is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
